The '''Pocker LJ''' was an '''ion-burst-powered atlatl''', a simple spear-thrower that used a [[laser sighting unit]] for aiming. It was a good first rifle for young people, and was good for certain types of hunting. It was popular on backwater and low-tech worlds because of its simplicity and inexpensiveness.

A young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] learned to fish on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] using a pocker with a line attached. His father [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] made Boba turn off the laser sight to practice his aim.
